title: Geeon's Enchantments
description: Custom enchantments for Horse and Wolf armor, including Fang for damage and Great Beast for easier travel. The Enchantments cannot only be found on enchantment tables, but also in loot chests and from villagers.
body:
# Geeon's Enchantments
This is a datapack I made that adds some enchantments to the game that I think are either cool, or are something along the lines of things I think should be in the game already.
## Current Enchantments
All current Enchantments can be found in enchanting tables
- Great Beast: great beast is an enchantment for horse armor that makes your horse larger, and adds some buffs and debuffs that come with that fact.
  - only found on books
  - Also works on Wolf Armor
- Striding: striding is an enchantment for leggings that increases your step height and your speed as well at higher levels
- Piccorification: piccorification is an enchantment that makes you tiny and changes gameplay based on that fact
- Messenger: Improves the Mobility stats of horses
- Fangs: Wolf Armor Enchantment that buffs damage
- My Little Pony: Makes your horse tiny and able to take semi flight
  - Treasure only enchantment
## Current Existing Enchantment Tweaks
- Soul Speed: Soul Speed can now be applied to horse armor and wolf armor
- Frost Walker: Frost Walker can now be applied to horse armor, and is paritied with Bedrock
  - Bedrock parity increases size of Frost Walker by 1 each level
- Bane of Arthropods: Bane of Arthropods now shows up less in enchanting tables
- General Armor Enchantments also work on horse and wolf armor
- Feather Falling can now be applied to wolf and horse armor
## Works in progress
as of 23w33a, what can be enchanted through an enchanting table is now a tag, so I'm working on a new version where you can enchant horse and wolf armor directly in the enchanting table.
- Reentry
  - Mace enchantment that causes a fiery explosion that gets larger the higher you fall from
- Anti-Gravity
  - Boot enchantment that gives reduces your gravity and tweaks all appropriate variables
- A Curse that kills you (highly requested feature)
- Vampirisim
  - A damage enchantment that heals you when you do damage
- Channeling buff via multiple levels of channeling where each level improves the channeling power
- Trident enchantmet that splashes water on hit and extinguishes fires
##  
If there any enchantments you think would be cool suggest them in the discord.
